description_long: This is a compact, modern rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a skeletonized folding stock and a prominent Picatinny rail along the top for mounting optics or accessories. The receiver is angular and streamlined, with a pistol grip and a trigger guard integrated into the lower assembly. The barrel is relatively short, ending in a flash hider, and the front sight is fixed, while the rear sight appears to be a simple notch or aperture. The magazine is not visible, suggesting it may be detachable and inserted from below. The overall design is tactical and utilitarian, suitable for close-quarters urban environments. The materials appear to be primarily metal with some polymer components for the grip and stock.
description: A compact, matte black tactical rifle with a folding skeletonized stock, short barrel, and top Picatinny rail. Designed for urban use, it features a pistol grip and integrated iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel, flash hider, and front sight post.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the folding skeletonized stock, Picatinny rail, and pistol grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the slim profile of the stock and receiver.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the folding stock and overall compactness.
